---
title: "War as Sacrifice, Trial, and National Rebirth"
subtitle: "Lincoln's Gettysburg Address and the Nature of War"
author: "Andrew Hammer"
date: last-modified
abstract: |
  Draft abstract pending evidence coding and thesis approval.
keywords:
  - Abraham Lincoln
  - Gettysburg Address
  - Civil War
  - sacrifice
  - political theology
  - war
---

# Introduction

This manuscript must not be drafted from the dossier alone. Draft from approved claims and evidence after Goal 30.

# Method and limits

# Historical and ceremonial context

# War as the test of an embodied proposition

# Soldier death and national life

# Consecration and interpretive authority

# The dead as a claim upon the living

# New birth, emancipation, and transformation

# Providence, judgment, and counterevidence

# Conclusion
